steps.code:
<?php 
require_once 'wp-load.php';
wp_delete_post( 1, true ); // Hello World
wp_delete_post( 2, true ); // Sample Page

<?php 
require_once 'wp-load.php';
require_once ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/image.php';
require_once ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/file.php';
require_once ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/media.php';
require_once ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/post.php';

// 1. Set Site Icon
$icon_url = 'https://native-blocks-carousel.weblazer.fr/playground/site-icon.png';
$tmp = download_url($icon_url);
if (!is_wp_error($tmp)) {
    $file_array = array('name' => 'site-icon.png', 'tmp_name' => $tmp);
    $attachment_id = media_handle_sideload($file_array, 0);
    if (!is_wp_error($attachment_id)) {
        update_option('site_icon', $attachment_id);
    }
}

// 2. Set Site Logo
$logo_url = 'https://native-blocks-carousel.weblazer.fr/wp-content/uploads/icon.svg';
$tmp_logo = download_url($logo_url);
if (!is_wp_error($tmp_logo)) {
    $file_array = array('name' => 'icon.svg', 'tmp_name' => $tmp_logo);
    $attachment_id = media_handle_sideload($file_array, 0);
    if (!is_wp_error($attachment_id)) {
        update_option('site_logo', $attachment_id);
    }
}

// 3. Flush Rewrite Rules
flush_rewrite_rules(true);

// 4. Reset Theme and Clean FSE Caches
if (function_exists('wp_clean_theme_json_cache')) {
    wp_clean_theme_json_cache();
}
if (class_exists('WP_Theme_JSON_Resolver')) {
    WP_Theme_JSON_Resolver::clean_cached_data();
}
wp_clean_themes_cache();

// Re-activate theme to force rebuild of all FSE styles and transients
$current_theme = get_stylesheet();
switch_theme($current_theme);

// Delete FSE and theme transients
global $wpdb;
$wpdb->query("DELETE FROM $wpdb->options WHERE option_name LIKE '_transient_wp_core_block_css_files%'");
$wpdb->query("DELETE FROM $wpdb->options WHERE option_name LIKE '_transient_global_styles%'");
$wpdb->query("DELETE FROM $wpdb->options WHERE option_name LIKE '_transient_theme_json%'");

// 5. Ensure the imported Home page is set as the Front Page
$home_page = get_page_by_path('sample-page');
if (!$home_page) {
    $pages = get_pages(array(
        'meta_key' => '_wp_page_template',
        'meta_value' => 'default',
        'hierarchical' => 0
    ));
    foreach ($pages as $p) {
        if (strtolower($p->post_title) === 'home' || $p->post_name === 'home' || strtolower($p->post_title) === 'accueil') {
            $home_page = $p;
            break;
        }
    }
}
if ($home_page) {
    update_option('show_on_front', 'page');
    update_option('page_on_front', $home_page->ID);
}

wp_cache_flush();
